summary: Growth Copilot workflow UI: ad performance summary (spend, ROAS, CPC, conversions) from mock fixtures, ranked scale/cut recommendations with metric citations in task bodies, shared no-op executor. SellerHomeShell routes growth workflow to GrowthCopilotPanel. No TikTok API calls.

interfaceChanges.description: Pure function aggregating ad spend, weighted ROAS/CPC, and conversions from persona ad_campaigns.
Sorts growth tasks by estimated_impact_vnd descending.
Account-level ad metrics card for growth workflow.
Growth workflow panel with ad summary and ranked scale/cut task queue.
Routes growth workflow to GrowthCopilotPanel instead of generic TaskQueue.

mappings.criterion: Growth persona renders ad performance summary from mock fixtures
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_growth_copilot.test.tsx::renders spend, ROAS, CPC, and conversions from mock fixtures

mappings.criterion: Scale and pause/cut recommendations cite metric justification
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_growth_copilot.test.tsx::renders at least 2 ad tasks with ROAS or CPC metric citations in body
web/src/__tests__/test_growth_copilot.test.tsx::dismiss removes campaign task from active queue

mappings.criterion: Integration test: growth persona renders ≥2 ad tasks with metric citations
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_growth_copilot.test.tsx::renders at least 2 ad tasks with ROAS or CPC metric citations in body

mappings.criterion: Integration test: dismiss removes campaign task from active queue
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_growth_copilot.test.tsx::dismiss removes campaign task from active queue
static review — all data from growth-persona.ts fixtures
